info.name: PAY-3605 Unmatched Settlement Alert (Treasury)
info.description:
E2E driver for the Unmatched Settlement Transaction Alert feature (treasury-ms).

The alert has NO UI and NO dedicated endpoint — it fires internally during a funding-batch run. This collection drives the only HTTP lever: POST /create-funding-batch.

USAGE
1. Import this collection AND an environment file (see PAY-3605-*.postman_environment.json). Select the DEV environment.
2. Fill `clientSecret` in the environment (from Key Vault) — do NOT commit it.
3. The collection-level pre-request script auto-mints a client_credentials token and caches it until ~60s before expiry, so you can just hit '2. Trigger' repeatedly across Scenarios A/B/C/D.
4. Verify in App Insights (KQL) + SendGrid Activity Feed + inbox — telemetry alone does NOT prove delivery.

The runbook (PAY-3605-Story-1.1-E2E-Unmatched-Settlement-Alert-Runbook.md) is the source of truth for scenarios, seed SQL, and pass criteria.

exec: // Auto-mint a client_credentials token if missing or within 60s of expiry.
// Lets you click '2. Trigger' over and over without re-running the token request.
if (!clientSecret) { console.warn('clientSecret is empty — set it in the environment before triggering.'); }
if (err) { console.error('Token mint failed:', err); return; }
if (res.code !== 200) { console.error('Token mint HTTP ' + res.code + ': ' + res.text()); return; }

request.description: Optional. The collection pre-request script already mints a token automatically. Use this only to debug auth (e.g. confirm the returned `scope` includes WellfitPaymentsAPI.DynamicFunding). A 401/invalid_client here means wrong clientId/secret; a token without the scope means the client isn't granted DynamicFunding (check [Identity].[ClientScopes]).

exec: if (pm.response.code === 503) { console.warn('503 — coordinator queue full. Re-send.'); }
if (pm.response.code === 401) { console.error('401 — token missing/!DynamicFunding. Run "1. Get Token" to inspect.'); }
try { const j = pm.response.json(); console.log('correlationId =', j.correlationId, '| stage =', j.stage); } catch (e) {}
console.log('Now wait ~15-60s, then run the App Insights verify query. 202 != done — the orchestrator runs on the background coordinator.');

request.description:
Fires a funding-batch run. Returns 202 immediately with { correlationId, stage }. The unmatched-settlement orchestrator runs seconds later on the coordinator.

Per scenario (seed the DB first per the runbook Appendix A):
- A: 4 seeded rows  -> one email + UnmatchedAlertSent
- B: empty table    -> no email + UnmatchedAlertSuppressed
- C: re-seed, send TWICE without deleting -> two emails (re-alert-until-cleared, D2)
- D: kill-switch OFF (+restart) -> no email, no telemetry at all

503 = queue full (retry). 401 = token problem.

url.raw: https://api.applicationinsights.io/v1/apps/{{appInsightsAppId}}/query?query=customEvents | where timestamp > ago(30m) | where name in ('UnmatchedAlertSent','UnmatchedAlertSuppressed','UnmatchedAlertSendFailed') | project timestamp, name, customDimensions | order by timestamp desc

query.value: customEvents | where timestamp > ago(30m) | where name in ('UnmatchedAlertSent','UnmatchedAlertSuppressed','UnmatchedAlertSendFailed') | project timestamp, name, customDimensions | order by timestamp desc

request.description:
OPTIONAL data-plane query of App Insights (avoids the portal).

Set two env vars first:
- appInsightsAppId:  az monitor app-insights component show -g dev-rg-plat-api-wus3 -a dev-platform-treasury --subscription 22d04286-db4f-411f-bfa5-da1aea40c19e --query appId -o tsv
- aiBearer:          az account get-access-token --resource https://api.applicationinsights.io --query accessToken -o tsv

NOTE: telemetry only proves the alert was ATTEMPTED/accepted. UnmatchedAlertSent != delivered. Confirm delivery in the SendGrid Activity Feed + M365 quarantine.
